# Security policy

## Supported versions

Dust Rush is pre-release. Security fixes are made only on the latest `main` branch until versioned releases begin.

## Report a vulnerability privately

Use **Security → Report a vulnerability** in this repository so details remain private while the issue is assessed. Include impact, reproduction steps, affected files or versions, and a suggested mitigation when possible.

If private reporting is temporarily unavailable, open a public issue that asks the maintainer to establish private contact. Do not include exploit details, secrets, personal data, or a working proof of concept in that issue.

You should receive an acknowledgement within seven days. Timelines for remediation and disclosure will be agreed after triage.

## Scope

Reports about source code, build automation, dependency handling, asset import, save-data handling, and future network features are welcome. General gameplay bugs belong in the regular issue tracker.
